title: Path to Proving a Metric Space is Disconnected
description: A decision flowchart outlining the key definitions and logical steps used to prove whether a metric space is connected or disconnected, a common examination topic.
elements: Find two non-empty, disjoint open sets
Success: Proof complete, space is disconnected
relationships: Start leads to two primary strategies: finding disjoint open sets or finding a clopen set
If either strategy is successful, it proves the space is disconnected
If both strategies fail after exhaustive search, one concludes the space is connected
